description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a lush garden and enclosed by a perimeter wall. The house features a complex, multi-hipped roof with several intersecting sections, and a driveway leading to a garage at the front. The property includes a backyard with a swimming pool, a hot tub, and a wooden deck area, as well as numerous trees and shrubs, some with purple blossoms. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across the visible facades. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the darker roof and driveway, and the landscaping is meticulously organized for both privacy and aesthetics.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-hipped roof, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a pool, and a driveway, enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, garage, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, side garden, and partial view of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, hot tub, wooden deck, and extensive greenery.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the back of the bungalow with visible garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
